name: mosvera-mcp
description: Resolve, compile, and save local Mosvera aesthetics from Claude Desktop.
long_description: Mosvera runs locally against your own aesthetic registry. It lets Claude list named aesthetics, resolve them to canonical Mosvera models, compile portable design tokens and CSS variables, and save registry documents without sending provider requests or storing secrets.

tools.name: server_status
tools.description: Show registry path, write mode, versions, counts, and diagnostics.

tools.name: list_aesthetics
tools.description: List named aesthetics in the active local registry.

tools.name: get_registry_document
tools.description: Fetch a template, modifier, palette, composition, or capability manifest.

tools.name: validate_document
tools.description: Validate one Mosvera document against a schema kind.

tools.name: validate_aesthetic_pack
tools.description: Validate an inline or local .mosvera.json aesthetic pack.

tools.name: preview_aesthetic_import
tools.description: Preview importing an aesthetic pack without writing files.

tools.name: export_aesthetic_pack
tools.description: Export a named aesthetic as a portable .mosvera.json pack.

tools.name: resolve_aesthetic
tools.description: Resolve a named or inline aesthetic to the canonical Mosvera model.

tools.name: compile_design_tokens
tools.description: Compile an aesthetic into portable design tokens and CSS variables.

tools.name: compile_provider_payload
tools.description: Compile a deterministic provider payload without making provider HTTP calls.

tools.name: draft_aesthetic
tools.description: Draft a valid composition document without saving it.

tools.name: save_aesthetic
tools.description: Create or update a named aesthetic in the active local registry.

tools.name: save_registry_document
tools.description: Create or update an advanced registry document.

tools.name: delete_registry_document
tools.description: Delete a registry document from the active local registry.

tools.name: import_aesthetic_pack
tools.description: Import an aesthetic pack into the active local registry.

registry_directory.title: Mosvera Registry Directory
registry_directory.description: Optional local folder for your Mosvera aesthetic registry. Leave empty to use the platform default.

read_only_mode.title: Read-only mode
read_only_mode.description: Hide registry-writing tools and use Mosvera only for inspection and compilation.
